description_long: This modern bungalow features a clean, angular design with a flat roof and a two-story section on one side. The front area includes a double carport with two parked vehicles and a paved driveway, while the backyard boasts a rectangular swimming pool, a large palm tree, and a covered patio lounge area with outdoor furniture. The building's facade is predominantly white with dark gray accents, and large windows provide ample natural light to the interior. The landscaping is minimalistic, with patches of green grass and small shrubs along the perimeter. The structure is surrounded by a low boundary wall, and the overall layout emphasizes open outdoor living spaces. The architectural style is distinctly modern, with an emphasis on geometric forms and functional outdoor amenities.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with a two-story section, double carport, swimming pool, and minimalist landscaping. The design features clean lines, large windows, and a spacious outdoor living area.
description_view_0: Front view showing the double carport, driveway, main entrance, and a clear view of the pool and patio area.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the flat roof, the palm tree, and the pool area, with less visibility of the carport.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the back of the bungalow, the pool, and the palm tree, with minimal detail of the carport.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the pool, patio, and the boundary wall, with the two-story section visible in the background.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large front and side windows
